name: ImportConfiguration
description: Configuration for an import deployment operation specifying the files and settings to deploy.

name.description: Name of the deployment, displayed in Appian Designer's Deploy view.

packageFileName.description: File name of the deployment package ZIP file attached in the form data.

adminConsoleSettingsFileName.description: File name of the Admin Console settings ZIP file attached in the form data.

customizationFileName.description: File name of the import customization properties file attached in the form data.

pluginsFileName.description: File name of the plug-ins ZIP file attached in the form data.

dataSource.description: The data source name or UUID for database script execution.

databaseScripts.description: Array of database script configurations specifying file names and execution order.

fileName.description: The file name of the database script.

orderId.description: The execution order for the script, starting at 1.
